title: Create Xcode project scaffold with models and services
description: Xcode project, App entry, models (Account, Mailbox, Message), services (GmailAPI, Auth, Keychain), 3-pane ContentView skeleton

title: Implement all SwiftUI views and ViewModels
description: SidebarView, MessageListView, MessageDetailView, ComposeView, SearchBar, all ViewModels with Gmail service wiring

title: Write unit tests with mocks
description: Unit tests for models, services (mocked), and view models. Docker-ready test runner.

title: Build verification and GCP setup guide
description: Verify app builds, tests pass, create GCP_SETUP.md with OAuth registration guidance

title: Enable multiple concurrent compose windows via Cmd+N
description: Use WindowGroup with value type to allow multiple compose windows. Create ComposeContext model, update MaxBoxApp.swift scene, and ensure each window has independent state.

title: Build message cache on account creation
description: After OAuth completes and account is added, trigger background fetch of inbox/sent/drafts messages. Show progress in activity manager.

title: Animated search icon that expands to text input with search arrow
description: Replace SearchBar with magnifying glass icon that animates to larger text input on click. Add arrow button next to expanded input to initiate search.

title: Double-click message to open in own window with action toolbar
description: Open message in separate window on double-click. Toolbar: reply, reply all, forward, archive, delete icons. Need new MessageWindowView and WindowGroup scene.

title: Double-click draft to resume editing in new compose window
description: Detect draft double-click in message list. Open compose window pre-filled with draft content for continued editing. Depends on multi-compose.
